programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A recent widow comes to the realization that her late husband purchased a winning lottery ticket so she goes to great lengths to recover it -- and keep the winnings for herself Meanwhile a grave digger resorts to blackmail to land the woman of his dreams

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A frustrated ambitious scriptwriter plans to use the information that one of the top producers in the Hollywood studio hes working for might be a werewolf to finally advance his career

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After accidentally assaulting a mime obnoxious radio DJ Rick Rake is tormented by the mime Meanwhile it turns out that the mime is also a burglar who learns that the last people he robbed were also killed

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hong 112
programme.desc: Hong 112

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to stop MAD from releasing millions in counterfeit money

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: Costly defeats made possible by commanders who disastrously underestimated their enemies

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain

programme.title: Follow The Flag
programme.desc: The Flag Marine Corps Documentary

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 4
programme.desc: Part 4 Showdown in the Iron Triangle

programme.title: Armistice - The End Game of WW1
programme.desc: Professor David Reynolds uncovers a story of wounded egos political scheming and strategy behind the lines as statesmen and generals haggled over the terms of peace while the soldiers fought on the front-line

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans John Wayne a cowboy on the run is injured when his horse stumbles near a Quaker familys land The family takes him in as he regains his health and he falls for their young daughter Penelope Gail Russell As Quirt falls deeper in love and becomes accustomed to the familys peaceful ways his violent past starts to catch up to him Eventually he is forced to decide whether it is worth letting go of his turbulent former life for his future with Penelope

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: With Eric apparently dead in the morgue Alamo Joe recovers from his wounds in the hospital and reevaluates his life decisions He fears he was bitten and will now become a werewolf Eric returns from the dead and escapes from the morgue

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While searching for a serial killer Nick Knight discovers a chance to end his vampire curse While Schanke tracks down leads in the human world Nick learns that the murder may be the work of the man who made him a vampire 700 years ago

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack track down a cursed scalpel that has found its way into the hands of a talented surgeon

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A conflict arises between Luke and Kate when Grandpa monopolizes all of Lukes free time but Grandpa decides to make amends after Pepino makes him aware that he is the source of the problem

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Smart 423
programme.desc: Smart 423

programme.title: Smart 512
programme.desc: Smart 512

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The Hi-Ballers under new leader Riker are relentless in their pursuit of BJ and the Piston Packin Mamas especially after word gets out that BJ Snow White and the lady truckers are hauling truckloads of money for the Treasury Dept

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans 324
programme.desc: Hogans 324

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Learning that the German army is manufacturing an improved Tiger tank Hogan and his men are determined to steal one so they can disassemble it and make blueprints for the Allies

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: Academy Award® winners Robert DeNiro and Al Pacino head a stellar cast in this taut psychological drama about an obsessive detective and a brilliant thief whose fates are linked in the aftermath of a high-stakes securities heist As the criminal plans his final heist their personal lives begin to unravel as they engage in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse leading the adversaries to come to hate and respect one another

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 31 Fractured Fairy Tales The Elves and the Shoemaker Dudley Do-Right Story 3 Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 32

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 202
programme.desc: Hercules 202

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: With a reporter on board the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space Liam is the prime suspect causing an even bigger rift between Daan and Zoor As the ship floats lost in space they must find the real culprit

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens continue to expand their operations Sparked by random footage shot by a reporter Harrisons the team descend on the previously abandoned town of Beeton where they find a bustling community that in theory should not exist

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an injured escapee from a mental hospital arrives at Will and Tressas door after running into Alec he claims to be an alien on a mission Hes obviously insane - or is he

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After a mob enforcer still wearing his brass knuckles falls to death from a high-rise hotel window the police seal off the hotel and hunt for two other mobsters and the down-and-out boxer who was their planned target

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis one of the countrys richest financier

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: See how fighting has impacted Jeremy Perdue's life and how he has to balance life and fighting. Does Jeremy's training pay off in the end against Chris Robinson....Find out in this episode!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chad Anheliger is well rounded in most fight sports but has been having issues with hip flexibility and a long-term shoulder injury. After some time with Sports Conditioning coach Marie Michalski, he learns valuable skills to make him a stronger fighter.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alexander Shlemenko v. Brandon Halsey

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 44 continues with two action-packed Light Heavyweight matchups. Anton Tokarchuk takes on Josh Heinz, and UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace goes the distance against Kalib Starnes.

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League visits a planet which harbours the greatest computer ever built hoping its terminals hold information on Audrics whereabouts The computer Logos keeps switching Audric back and forth between helping and fighting Jayce

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.desc: Mask 165

programme.title: MASK

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Presto accidentally transports his friends to a faraway place where they face an enormous danger literally Now he must climb to the new heights of courage and master his magic to save the others

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids are adopted by a loving caravan leader who is searching for his daughter who was abducted by a demon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget has a double mission not only to retrieve a pearl necklace but also to stop the gang from making an alliance with Chow

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation
